bluetooth_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?

secret.description: {name} requires an 8-byte secret key before it will accept commands. Home Assistant tried to read it directly from the device but couldn't — this only works while the device is unbound (factory-reset and not paired in the Govee app). Enter it as 16 hex characters (e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f60718), or leave blank to add the device now and set the key later. You can also obtain it from the Govee cloud account or a btsnoop capture.

reconfigure.description: Re-check that {name} is currently reachable over Bluetooth and reload it. For devices that need a secret key, you can set or update it below.

error.invalid_secret: The secret key must be 16 hex characters (8 bytes), e.g. a1b2c3d4e5f60718.

abort.no_devices_found: No unconfigured supported Govee devices found.
abort.not_supported: This Govee model isn't supported by this integration yet.
abort.not_found: The device could not be found over Bluetooth right now. Make sure it is powered on and in range, then try again.

scene_broken.message: The scene '{effect}' is known to fail to render correctly on this device and is disabled until that is resolved.
